Scan Books

📱 Point your camera at a book's ISBN barcode or cover. Bookburrow will automatically add it to your library.

Ready to scan — click "Start Scanning" or enter an ISBN below.

Camera Preview

Recently Scanned

Photo Shelf

📸 Upload shelf photos and tag books.

removes duplicate uploads (keeps newest) + non-JPEG

🧩 Shelf Puzzle

Photograph one shelf — or a whole bookcase — and rebuild it here in order, then link every book to your library.

Only needed for AI reading. Tap-in-order and individual photos work without it. AI scanning needs the live https site — it won't work from a local file.

📸

Drag & drop bookshelf photos here

or click to select images (JPG, PNG)

Import / Export

📥 Export Your Library

Download your library as a backup.

🔔 Release Alerts

Get a browser notification when an upcoming book on your shelves drops. Set a release date on any book to track it. Alerts fire while Bookburrow is open in your browser.

REMIND ME

💾 Full Backup & Restore

Full backup — everything included.

⚠️ Danger Zone

Can't be undone. A backup downloads first, just in case.

📤 Import Books

CSV, JSON, or Goodreads export.

Drag and drop CSV/JSON file here

or click to select · Supports Goodreads CSV exports!

Supported formats:
Bookburrow CSV/JSON · Goodreads CSV export · Any CSV with title/author columns
